response.global_analysis: The video starts with a long instrumental intro featuring event graphics, followed by audience interviews and a live performance by La+ Darknesss. I prioritized the spoken interviews and the live vocals. Phonetic discrepancies in the Reference JSON for the song 'Yakousei Haizu' (e.g., 'コトコトタイ') were corrected using the burnt-in on-screen lyrics ('凝り固まった'). Timestamps are strictly aligned with the audio vocalizations, and mid-sentence pauses in the interviews were handled by splitting the text to maintain synchronization.

subtitles.original: （ラプラスの生誕祭は）割とレベルの高い合格点を超える
subtitles.english: (La+ birthday lives) always exceed my expectations,

subtitles.original: 生誕祭をオールウェイズ出してくれる
subtitles.english: delivering a high level of quality every single time.

subtitles.original: どこから来たんですか？
subtitles.english: Where did you come from?

subtitles.original: スト6の方から
subtitles.english: From the Street Fighter 6 community.

subtitles.original: 開会してるんでしょ？
subtitles.english: The event is opening, right?

subtitles.original: 閉会しています！
subtitles.english: It's closed!

subtitles.original: 開会してるんでしょ？
subtitles.english: It's opening, right?

subtitles.original: 閉会しています！
subtitles.english: It's closed!

subtitles.original: さっき開会してるって言ったじゃん
subtitles.english: You just said it was opening!

subtitles.original: 閉会しています！
subtitles.english: It's closed!

subtitles.original: ラプラス・ダークネスの生誕祭は…
subtitles.english: The La+ Darknesss birthday live is...

subtitles.original: 閉会しています！
subtitles.english: Closed!

subtitles.original: みんな！吾輩の誕生日ライブに来てくれてありがとね！
subtitles.english: Everyone! Thank you for coming to my birthday live!

subtitles.original: まずは1曲目、夜行性ハイズ！
subtitles.english: First up, the first song: Yakousei Haizu!

subtitles.original: いくぞー！
subtitles.english: Here we go!

subtitles.original: 凝り固まった 忘れてたい
subtitles.english: Stiffened up, I want to forget it all

subtitles.original: そんな顔でいつまで戦うの？
subtitles.english: How long will you fight with a face like that?

subtitles.original: また一人で
subtitles.english: Alone again

subtitles.original: 愛しても、愛しても
subtitles.english: Even if I love you, even if I love you

subtitles.original: そのたびに不意に不安が顔を出す
subtitles.english: Every time, anxiety suddenly shows its face

subtitles.original: 巻き戻るように
subtitles.english: As if rewinding

subtitles.original: どうして力尽くまで、さらに百まで
subtitles.english: Why must you go until exhausted, even to a hundred?

subtitles.original: 飲み込む悲しみだけは
subtitles.english: Only this sadness that I swallow down

subtitles.original: なくなってくれないの
subtitles.english: Refuses to disappear

subtitles.original: そうして逃げ場もないのに
subtitles.english: And so, with nowhere to run

subtitles.original: マイナス百から始まる動機の
subtitles.english: Embracing the days of motivation

subtitles.original: 日々を抱き舞う
subtitles.english: That start from minus a hundred
